title: Return to Previous STATUS state

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there some trick to make a STATUS column return to its previous state …

We have a board that is grouped by the state of the item … like “not started”, “started”, “done” “verified” and so on …

We have STATUS choices to go along with the state groups, and this is automated by using automations …

W also have a STATUS selection that (for sake og simplicity) can be called “PROBLEM” The user selects this STATUS as a part of i.e. a DONE? column, with Yes, No and Problem selections… The Problem selection also causes (by automation) the MAIN STATUS column to display something to reflect the Problem selection … like STUCK – I NEED HELP … or something along those lines

Now … changing the DONE status back to NO or YES is easy … But what about changing the MASTER STATUS column back to what is was before it was forced into STUCK – I NEED HELP by automation ???

Any suggestions ?

Regards Nils
